pr.title: Record: Polar Express NS + SLOT + MuonEq-R + XSA-all — 1.1043 BPB (3-seed mean)

output.summary: Combines Polar Express Newton-Schulz Muon orthogonalization with eval-time SLOT delta tuning, MuonEq-R row normalization, and XSA on every layer.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Not a val-only training regime; only uses SLOT during evaluation.
techniques: Polar Express Newton-Schulz for Muon steps
XSA across all layers with MuonEq-R row-normalized gradients
